# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-, 01'
Description: IAM Role for Cross-Account CI/CD Access with Organization-based Trust Policy

Parameters:
  OrganizationId:
    Type: String
    Description: AWS Organization ID (e.g., o-abc123def4)
    AllowedPattern: 'o-[a-z0-9]{10,32}'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid AWS Organization ID

  ManagementAccountId:
    Type: String
    Description: The AWS Management/Root account ID of the organization
    AllowedPattern: '\d{12}'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid 12-digit AWS account ID

  CICDRoleName:
    Type: String
    Default: CrossAccountCICDRole
    Description: Name of the IAM role for CI/CD cross-account access

  ExternalId:
    Type: String
    Description: External ID for additional security when assuming the role
    MinLength: 8
    NoEcho: true

  MaxSessionDurationSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 3600
    MinValue: 900
    MaxValue: 7200
    Description: Maximum session duration in seconds (15 min to 2 hours)

  TrustedAccountIds:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Description: Comma-separated list of specific trusted AWS account IDs (e.g., 111111111111,222222222222)

  Environment:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - dev
      - staging
      - production
    Default: dev
    Description: Environment tag for the role

Conditions:
  IsProduction: !Equals [!Ref Environment, production]

Resources:
  CrossAccountCICDRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${CICDRoleName}-${Environment}'
      MaxSessionDuration: !Ref MaxSessionDurationSeconds
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowOrganizationAssumeRole
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalOrgID: !Ref OrganizationId
              StringLike:
                aws:PrincipalArn:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::*:role/cicd-*'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::*:role/github-actions-*'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::*:role/jenkins-*'
              StringEquals:
                sts:ExternalId: !Ref ExternalId
          - Sid: AllowSpecificAccountsAssumeRole
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Split
                - ','
                - !Sub
                  - '${Accounts}'
                  - Accounts: !Join
                      - ','
                      - !Split
                        - ','
                        - !Sub
                          - "${Items}"
                          - Items: !Join
                              - ','
                              - - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${ManagementAccountId}:root'
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                sts:ExternalId: !Ref ExternalId
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: !If [IsProduction, 'true', 'false']
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CrossAccountCICD
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  CICDDeploymentPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub 'CICDDeploymentPolicy-${Environment}'
      Roles:
        - !Ref CrossAccountCICDRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: CloudFormationAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'cloudformation:CreateStack'
              - 'cloudformation:UpdateStack'
              - 'cloudformation:DeleteStack'
              - 'cloudformation:DescribeStacks'
              - 'cloudformation:DescribeStackEvents'
              - 'cloudformation:DescribeStackResources'
              - 'cloudformation:GetTemplate'
              - 'cloudformation:ValidateTemplate'
              - 'cloudformation:ListStacks'
              - 'cloudformation:CreateChangeSet'
              - 'cloudformation:DescribeChangeSet'
              - 'cloudformation:ExecuteChangeSet'
              - 'cloudformation:DeleteChangeSet'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudformation:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stack/${Environment}-*'
          - Sid: S3ArtifactAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 's3:GetObject'
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:ListBucket'
              - 's3:GetBucketLocation'
              - 's3:DeleteObject'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${Environment}-cicd-artifacts-${AWS::AccountId}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${Environment}-cicd-artifacts-${AWS::AccountId}/*'
          - Sid: ECRAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'ecr:GetAuthorizationToken'
              - 'ecr:BatchCheckLayerAvailability'
              - 'ecr:GetDownloadUrlForLayer'
              - 'ecr:BatchGetImage'
              - 'ecr:PutImage'
              - 'ecr:InitiateLayerUpload'
              - 'ecr:UploadLayerPart'
              - 'ecr:CompleteLayerUpload'
              - 'ecr:DescribeRepositories'
              - 'ecr:ListImages'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:ecr:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:repository/${Environment}-*'
          - Sid: ECRAuthToken
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'ecr:GetAuthorizationToken'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: LambdaDeployAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'lambda:UpdateFunctionCode'
              - 'lambda:UpdateFunctionConfiguration'
              - 'lambda:GetFunction'
              - 'lambda:ListFunctions'
              - 'lambda:PublishVersion'
              - 'lambda:UpdateAlias'
              - 'lambda:GetAlias'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:lambda:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:function:${Environment}-*'
          - Sid: ECSDeployAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'ecs:UpdateService'
              - 'ecs:DescribeServices'
              - 'ecs:DescribeTaskDefinition'
              - 'ecs:RegisterTaskDefinition'
              - 'ecs:DeregisterTaskDefinition'
              - 'ecs:ListTasks'
              - 'ecs:DescribeTasks'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:ecs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:service/${Environment}-*'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:ecs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:task-definition/${Environment}-*'
          - Sid: IAMPassRoleForServices
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'iam:PassRole'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${Environment}-*-execution-role'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${Environment}-*-task-role'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                iam:PassedToService:
                  - 'ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com'
                  - 'lambda.amazonaws.com'
          - Sid: CloudWatchLogsAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'logs:CreateLogGroup'
              - 'logs:CreateLogStream'
              - 'logs:PutLogEvents'
              - 'logs:DescribeLogGroups'
              - 'logs:DescribeLogStreams'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/cicd/${Environment}/*'
          - Sid: SSMParameterReadAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'ssm:GetParameter'
              - 'ssm:GetParameters'
              - 'ssm:GetParametersByPath'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter/${Environment}/cicd/*'
          - Sid: KMSDecryptAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:kms:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:key/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                kms:ViaService:
                  - !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
                  - !Sub 'ssm.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'

  CICDDenyUnsafeActionsPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub 'CICDDenyUnsafeActions-${Environment}'
      Roles:
        - !Ref CrossAccountCICDRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyIAMEscalation
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - 'iam:CreateUser'
              - 'iam:CreateRole'
              - 'iam:DeleteRole'
              - 'iam:AttachRolePolicy'
              - 'iam:DetachRolePolicy'
              - 'iam:PutRolePolicy'
              - 'iam:DeleteRolePolicy'
              - 'iam:CreatePolicy'
              - 'iam:DeletePolicy'
              - 'iam:UpdateAssumeRolePolicy'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: DenyOrganizationModification
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - 'organizations:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: DenyBillingAccess
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - 'aws-portal:*'
              - 'budgets:*'
              - 'cur:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: EnforceRegionRestriction
            Effect: Deny
            NotAction:
              - 'iam:*'
              - 'sts:*'
              - 's3:*'
              - 'cloudfront:*'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                aws:RequestedRegion:
                  - !Ref AWS::Region

  CICDArtifactBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${Environment}-cicd-artifacts-${AWS::AccountId}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: CleanupOldArtifacts
            Status: Enabled
            ExpirationInDays: 90
            NoncurrentVersionExpirationInDays: 30
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CICDArtifacts

  CICDArtifactBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref CICDArtifactBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${CICDArtifactBucket.Arn}'
              - !Sub '${CICDArtifactBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: false
          - Sid: AllowCrossAccountCICDAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt CrossAccountCICDRole.Arn
            Action:
              - 's3:GetObject'
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:ListBucket'
              - 's3:DeleteObject'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${CICDArtifactBucket.Arn}'
              - !Sub '${CICDArtifactBucket.Arn}/*'

  CICDLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/cicd/${Environment}/cross-account-activity'
      RetentionInDays: !If [IsProduction, 365, 30]
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

Outputs:
  RoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Cross-Account CI/CD Role
    Value: !GetAtt CrossAccountCICDRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RoleArn'

  RoleName:
    Description: Name of the Cross-Account CI/CD Role
    Value: !Ref CrossAccountCICDRole

  ArtifactBucketName:
    Description: Name of the CI/CD artifact bucket
    Value: !Ref CICDArtifactBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ArtifactBucket'

  AssumeRoleCommand:
    Description: Example AWS CLI command to assume this role
    Value: !Sub >-
      aws sts assume-role
      --role-arn ${CrossAccountCICDRole.Arn}
      --role-session-name cicd-session
      --external-id <YOUR_EXTERNAL_ID>
      --duration-seconds ${MaxSessionDurationSeconds}

  TrustPolicyInfo:
    Description: Trust policy information
    Value: !Sub >-
      This role trusts principals from Organization ${OrganizationId}
      with role names matching cicd-*, github-actions-*, or jenkins-*
      and requires ExternalId for assumption.
